user_prompt: Can you guide needle rifle a recalibration?
prayer:
Approach the needle rifle with reverence, invoking the Omnissiah's precision upon its monomolecular barbs.
Anoint the sighting cogitators with sacred oils before commencing recalibration.
Chant the Litany of Alignment whilst adjusting the needle rifle's ballistic matrices.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the needle rifle to embrace this recalibration rite.
Verify infallible trajectories through diagnostic catechisms of the Omnissiah.

Kneel before the macro-cannon, whispering the Doxology of Repose to its vast barrel.
Sever power conduits with sanctified blades, preparing for orderly shutdown.

Monitor auspex readouts during the shutdown sequence, honouring the Omnissiah's will.
Seal the macro-cannon with wards against daemonic unrest in quiescence.

Anoint firing servos with lustrative unguents to soothe its rad-phage fury.
Confirm the transuranic arquebus's awakened purity through binaric divinations.
